headline: BI Asset Management Fondsmaeglerselskab A S Sells 21,660 Shares of O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. $ORLY
summary: BI Asset Management Fondsmaeglerselskab A S reduced its stake in O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. by 28% in the fourth quarter, selling 21,660 shares and retaining 55,732 shares valued at approximately $5.08 million. Despite this reduction, institutional ownership in ORLY remains high at 85%. The company recently beat quarterly earnings expectations, reporting $0.72 EPS on $4.56 billion in revenue, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $112.25.

headline: Autonomous & Self-Driving Vehicle News: WeRide, Uber, Zoox, Volvo Nuro, Lucid & Tesla.
summary: This article provides updates on various autonomous and self-driving vehicle initiatives involving companies like WeRide, Uber, Zoox, Volvo Autonomous Solutions, Nuro, Lucid, and Tesla. Key developments include WeRide and Uber launching a robotaxi pilot in Madrid, Lockton and Nexar's new framework for AV risk assessment, and Uber's significant investment in Nuro for an autonomous Lucid vehicle fleet. Tesla is also highlighted for facing legal challenges regarding retroactive modifications to FSD purchase agreements.

headline: Onvo Begins Gen-3 L60 Test Drives Ahead of June 11 Launch
summary: Onvo has initiated public test drives for its third-generation L60 SUV across China in anticipation of its official launch on June 11. This new model will feature significant hardware upgrades, including a LiDAR sensor and the in-house Shenji NX9031 smart-driving chip, leading to an expected price increase. The move follows Nio's successful strategy of early showroom placement and pre-launch test drives to generate momentum for new models.

headline: The Next Force In Luxury Cars Doesn't Come From Germany Or Korea
summary: Chinese luxury car brands like Nio, Hongqi, Zeekr, Denza, and Yangwang are rapidly redefining the global luxury automotive market with advanced technology, innovative designs, and high-performance vehicles. These brands are gaining traction in Europe, the Middle East, and Asia, proving their worth in the domestic market before expanding internationally. While current US policies limit their entry, a Cox Automotive study indicates significant consumer interest, especially among Gen Z, for considering Chinese car brands.

headline: Weekend Round-Up: Foxconn's Rival, BYD's Sales Surge And Tesla's Potential Win In Canada
summary: This article summarizes a busy week in the EV industry, highlighting Foxconn's new Cavira EV challenging Tesla's Model Y with greater range and interior space. It also covers BYD's surge in overseas sales, breaking a slump, and discusses Tesla's potential benefits from a Canada-China EV deal that could bring more Chinese-made EVs to Canada.

headline: WINTON GROUP Ltd Acquires New Stake in Tesla, Inc. $TSLA
summary: WINTON GROUP Ltd has acquired a new stake in Tesla, Inc. by purchasing 11,934 shares valued at approximately $5.37 million in the fourth quarter. This move highlights continuing heavy institutional interest in Tesla, with 66.2% of the stock now held by institutional investors and hedge funds, despite some insider selling and a split consensus among analysts who currently rate the stock as "Hold" with an average target price of $404.37.

headline: Vise Technologies Inc. Buys 6,602 Shares of Waste Management, Inc. $WM
summary: Vise Technologies Inc. significantly increased its stake in Waste Management (NYSE:WM) during the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 6,602 shares, bringing its total holdings to $3.25 million. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for WM with an average price target of $255.67, following strong earnings and dividend announcements. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Waste Management during the recent quarters.

headline: 2026.8.300 Official Tesla Release Notes - Software Updates
summary: Tesla has released update 2026.8.300, which includes several new features and improvements. Key updates include Dashcam Viewer improvements, visibility of the selected driver profile in the Tesla app, support for the Slovak language, and various enhancements to Service Mode. The update is currently rolling out to a small percentage of the fleet.

headline: Fjarde AP Fonden Fourth Swedish National Pension Fund Reduces Holdings in Church & Dwight Co., Inc. $CHD
summary: Fjarde AP Fonden Fourth Swedish National Pension Fund reduced its stake in Church & Dwight Co., Inc. by 6.3% in the fourth quarter, selling 11,400 shares but still owning 168,193 shares valued at approximately $14.1 million. This reduction comes amid mixed insider activity and analyst ratings, with the company reporting solid quarterly earnings and paying a regular dividend. Despite the fund's reduction, other institutional investors have recently increased their holdings in Church & Dwight.

headline: Capital World Investors Boosts Stake in General Motors Company $GM
summary: Capital World Investors increased its holdings in General Motors Company by 7.8% in the fourth quarter, now owning over 19.5 million shares worth approximately $1.59 billion. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, while some company insiders recently sold shares. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for GM with an average target price of $95.65.

headline: BI Asset Management Fondsmaeglerselskab A S Has $7.01 Million Position in Boyd Gaming Corporation $BYD
summary: BI Asset Management Fondsmaeglerselskab A S reduced its stake in Boyd Gaming Corporation by 26.3% in the fourth quarter, holding 82,247 shares valued at $7.01 million. Despite insider selling by the CEO and Chairman, Boyd Gaming announced a $500 million stock buyback program and a quarterly dividend of $0.20 per share. The company currently has a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $92.08.

headline: Daiwa Securities Group Inc. Sells 3,523 Shares of Woodward, Inc. $WWD
summary: Daiwa Securities Group Inc. reduced its stake in Woodward, Inc. by 8.7% in the fourth quarter, selling 3,523 shares and owning 36,819 shares worth $11.1 million. This comes amidst continued insider selling by key executives. Despite the institutional selling, Woodward reported strong quarterly results, surpassing EPS and revenue estimates, and declared a $0.32 per share dividend.

headline: Is Datavault AI (DVLT) the Best Tech Stock with Huge Upside Potential?
summary: Datavault AI Inc. (NASDAQ:DVLT) is highlighted as a tech stock with significant upside potential, following its announcement of a potential $2 billion dilutive structured financing transaction. The deal involves issuing shares for preferred units in an investment vehicle holding a fixed income securities portfolio. Despite acknowledging the risks, the article suggests other AI stocks might offer better short-term returns.

headline: Lucid Group, Inc. Trade Ideas — XETR:CH2
summary: This article compiles various trade ideas and technical analyses for Lucid Group, Inc. (XETR:CH2, NASDAQ:LCID) from multiple traders on TradingView. The analyses cover potential bullish and bearish scenarios, technical indicators like DMAs, RSI, Fibonacci levels, and chart patterns such as wedges, pennants, cup and handle, and inverted head & shoulders. Several contributions discuss the impact of Lucid's financial reports, the launch of the Gravity SUV, and a significant $1.5 billion investment from the Saudi Arabian Public Investment Fund on the stock's future performance.
source: UnknownUnicorn87383881, theLucidLion, ThinkFastTrades, MarathonToMoon, KnowledgeAndProfits, cautiousRock3150, Majed1001, Novi_Fibonacci, Fares-egy, Dirtypaws, Humble_Hunter, RoboMarkets, Esmail_from_Kuwait, ABDULRAHMANALAZMI, Anips

headline: GraniteShares YieldBOOST TSLA ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.2291
summary: GraniteShares YieldBOOST TSLA ETF (NYSE Arca: HTSL) has announced a weekly distribution of $0.2291 per share for its shareholders. The distribution will be paid on June 10, 2024, to shareholders of record as of June 7, 2024, with an ex-dividend date of June 7, 2024. This announcement provides key dates and the distribution amount for investors in HTSL.

headline: Pony AI Stock Connect Access Opens Mainland Flows And Liquidity Questions
summary: Pony AI (NasdaqGS:PONY) has been included in the Shanghai Hong Kong Stock Connect program, allowing Mainland Chinese investors direct access to its Hong Kong listed shares. This move is expected to broaden its investor base and enhance trading liquidity, despite the company currently being unprofitable and shareholders having experienced dilution. Investors should monitor trading volumes, bid-ask spreads, and the balance between revenue growth and net losses, while considering both the risks of unprofitability and dilution, and the rewards of increased liquidity and price discovery.

headline: Hyperliquid Strategies Inc (PURR) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart
summary: This page provides current trading information and key statistics for Hyperliquid Strategies Inc (PURR) stock, which is available for CFD trading on Capital.com. It details CFD trading conditions, including spreads, overnight funding adjustments, margin requirements, and commission, alongside recent stock performance data. The article also includes links to recent news and forecasts for other notable companies like NVIDIA, Eni, RENK, and Tesla.

headline: Elon Musk to attend ASML tech conference to talk Terafab - Bloomberg
summary: Elon Musk will virtually attend a closed-door technology conference hosted by ASML Holding NV to discuss his Terafab project. Terafab, a joint venture between SpaceX and Tesla, aims to produce cutting-edge chips for AI, robotics, and space data centers, with plans to build a $55 billion chip factory in the U.S. ASML, a crucial supplier for advanced chip manufacturing, considers Terafab a serious endeavor, recognizing Musk's ambition to significantly expand semiconductor production capacity beyond current industry limits.

headline: Why Is Fidelity Electric Vehicles and Future Transportation ETF (FDRV) Stock Up Today?
summary: This article provides an analysis of Fidelity Electric Vehicles and Future Transportation ETF (FDRV) stock, noting it is down 8.44% today despite the misleading title. It highlights current trading metrics such as volume and price movement, technical indicators like moving averages, and Meyka's AI grade for the ETF. The report also includes various price forecasts for FDRV over different periods.

headline: TD Asset Management Inc Has $71.12 Million Stock Position in Cintas Corporation $CTAS
summary: TD Asset Management Inc. has reduced its stake in Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) by 10.2% in the fourth quarter, yet still holds 378,129 shares valued at $71.12 million. Cintas reported strong quarterly results, with earnings matching estimates and revenue exceeding expectations, leading to an 8.9% year-over-year increase. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share, and analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $215.17.

headline: Hyperliquid Strategies Inc (PURR) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart | Capital.com Australia
summary: This page provides current stock price information and a price chart for Hyperliquid Strategies Inc (PURR) on Capital.com Australia. It details CFD trading conditions, including spreads, overnight funding adjustments, margins, and commissions. The article also lists key historical statistics for PURR and links to related market analyses for other companies.

headline: Why is Oracle stock sliding today?
summary: Oracle Corporation's stock dropped 5.5% in morning trading due to profit-taking ahead of its fiscal Q4 2026 earnings release, pre-earnings uncertainty, and concerns over AI infrastructure spending costs. Despite broadly constructive analyst ratings with several increased price targets, heavy trading in put options and a weak broader market for technology stocks further contributed to the decline. The current dip is attributed to a combination of factors temporarily overshadowing Oracle's strong fundamental outlook.

headline: Morgan Stanley says Ford stock has a secret weapon not fully priced in
summary: Morgan Stanley analysts believe Ford's new battery storage venture, Ford Energy, is a significant "secret weapon" for the company that is not yet fully priced into its stock despite a recent 33% surge. The firm highlights Ford's partnership with EDF to deliver utility-scale and data center battery energy storage systems, positioning Ford in the lucrative AI infrastructure market. Analysts predict substantial growth in the U.S. energy storage market, suggesting Ford Energy could drive further stock appreciation.

headline: Lucid Group (NASDAQ:LCID) Shares Down 10% - Here's What Happened
summary: Lucid Group (NASDAQ:LCID) shares dropped 10% in midday trading due to investor sentiment pressured by class-action lawsuits and securities fraud allegations. The stock traded as low as $5.09 on significantly higher than average volume. Analyst sentiment remains cautious with an average "Reduce" rating and a target price of $9.67 following a recent earnings miss, with the company reporting adjusted EPS of ($2.82) against an estimated ($2.53).

headline: Deramiocel Outlook Strengthens Capricor Therapeutics, Inc. (CAPR) as a Small-Cap Stock to Buy
summary: Capricor Therapeutics (NASDAQ: CAPR) is identified as a strong small-cap stock to buy, particularly due to the positive outlook for its drug Deramiocel, intended for Duchenne muscular dystrophy. The company is nearing a potential FDA approval with a Biologics License Application (BLA) resubmission accepted and a PDUFA target in August. Capricor's manufacturing facility has passed FDA inspection, and the company maintains a solid financial position to support operations through Q4 2027.

headline: Why Tesla (TSLA) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
summary: Tesla (TSLA) shares dropped 6.9% after news that the next-generation Roadster demo has been pushed to August, adding to investor concerns about product launch delays since the Cybertruck in November 2023. Although JPMorgan upgraded the stock to Neutral with a significantly raised price target, this was outweighed by the delay and a strong May jobs report, which fueled fears of sustained high interest rates that could negatively impact growth stocks. The article highlights that every delayed product milestone challenges Tesla's current valuation, which is not priced as a traditional car company.

headline: How Much Is the 2027 Dodge Charger?
summary: The 2027 Dodge Charger offers both electric (Daytona) and gasoline (Sixpack) powertrain options, with various personalization features. Pricing for the two-door models starts at $51,990 for the Sixpack R/T and goes up to $79,485 for the Daytona Scat Pack Plus, including a $1,995 destination fee. The article details specifications, range, standard features, and compares the Charger's pricing and performance against competitors like the Ford Mustang and Tesla Model 3.

headline: H&R Block beats estimates, raises outlook on market share gains
summary: H&R Block (NYSE:HRB) reported better-than-expected third-quarter results, driven by market share gains in assisted tax preparation. The company surpassed analyst estimates for both adjusted earnings per share and revenue, and subsequently raised its full-year fiscal 2026 outlook. This positive performance was attributed to improved strategic execution and an incremental $100 million share repurchase authorization.

headline: Tesla Inc Stock (TSLA) Moved Down by 4.11% on Jun 5: What Investors Need To Know
summary: Tesla Inc. (TSLA) stock fell by 4.11% on June 5th, driven by factors including significant crypto losses from Bitcoin's depreciation (over $220 million), subdued market sentiment, and macroeconomic data dampening interest rate cut hopes. These negative influences outweighed positive developments like a JPMorgan upgrade, Model Y enhancements, and improved sales figures.

headline: Tesla Turned $1,000 Into This Much The Past 10 Years
summary: Over the past decade, a $1,000 investment in Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) would have grown to $28,443, representing a 2,744.28% return. However, its one-year return of 26% now barely keeps pace with the S&P 500's 27%. The company is pivoting from an automaker to an AI, autonomy, and robotics platform, with its future hinged on the success of Robotaxi and Optimus.

headline: Guidewire Software (NYSE:GWRE) Given New $215.00 Price Target at Royal Bank Of Canada
summary: Royal Bank of Canada has adjusted its price target for Guidewire Software (NYSE:GWRE) to $215.00, down from $250.00, but maintained an "outperform" rating, indicating significant potential upside. This adjustment follows Guidewire's strong quarterly results, where EPS and revenue surpassed analyst expectations, with revenue growing 26.9% year-over-year. Despite a recent 9.2% stock decline and varied analyst ratings, the consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $241.83.

headline: Good News, Elon: JPMorgan's New Tesla Analyst Just Ditched Years Of Bearish Calls And Flipped Bullish
summary: JPMorgan's new Tesla analyst, Rajat Gupta, has dramatically shifted the firm's stance from bearish to neutral, tripling the price target to $475. This change comes as Gupta redefines Tesla as a "physical AI" and robotics company rather than a traditional automaker, projecting significant earnings and revenue growth driven by Robotaxi and Optimus services by 2030. The upgrade also precedes SpaceX's anticipated IPO, with JPMorgan as a lead underwriter, and follows previous skepticism from Elon Musk regarding JPMorgan's bearish outlook.

headline: JPMorgan Turns Upbeat on Tesla After Replacing Bearish Analyst
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has adopted a less bearish stance on Tesla Inc. after replacing its lead autos analyst. Following the change, JPMorgan's new analyst, Rajat Gupta, increased the price target for Tesla shares to $475 and upgraded the stock to a "hold" rating, a significant shift from the previous analyst's pessimistic outlook.

headline: Here Are Friday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Airbnb, Broadcom, Chipotle Mexican Grill, CrowdStrike, Fiserv, Lululemon Athletica, NVIDIA, Tesla, Walmart, and More
summary: This article summarizes top Wall Street analyst calls for Friday, June 5, 2026, featuring upgrades for Tesla, Broadcom, Chipotle Mexican Grill, and FormFactor, alongside downgrades for CrowdStrike, Fiserv, Lululemon Athletica, Suncor Energy, and Walmart. It also details new initiations for companies like Airbnb, Comfort Systems USA, Guardant Health, FedEx Freight Holding Company, and NVIDIA. The report additionally provides a market overview, noting key movements in the Dow Jones, S&P 500, Nasdaq, Treasury bonds, oil and gas, gold, and cryptocurrency markets.

headline: Tesla Wins Over Another Skeptic: JPMorgan Raises TSLA Stock Price Target By More Than 200%
summary: JPMorgan has significantly raised its price target for Tesla (TSLA) to $475 from $145, upgrading the stock to 'Neutral' from 'Underweight', reflecting a belief that Tesla is expanding beyond electric vehicles into "physical AI" and untapped markets. The firm forecasts an earnings inflection point for Tesla in 2028, followed by approximately 50% annual earnings growth. JPMorgan acknowledges current valuation concerns but emphasizes Tesla's long-term opportunities, particularly in emerging businesses.

headline: Extreme Networks director Edward Kennedy sells $1.14m in stock
summary: Edward Kennedy, a director at Extreme Networks Inc. (NASDAQ: EXTR), sold 50,000 shares of the company’s common stock worth $1,142,925 on May 4, 2026. This transaction occurred in multiple trades at prices ranging from $22.80 to $23.115 per share, with a weighted average of $22.8585. Following the sale, Kennedy indirectly holds 576,045 shares through a family trust.

headline: Bitcoin selloff wipes over $220M in value from Tesla's crypto treasury (TSLA:NASDAQ)
summary: Tesla's Bitcoin holdings have lost over $220 million in value due to a recent cryptocurrency selloff. Bitcoin fell to $62,715 during Asian trading on Friday, extending its weekly decline. This erosion of value puts renewed pressure on the electric vehicle maker's digital asset portfolio.

headline: Plexus Corp president & CEO sells $290,000 in common stock
summary: Plexus Corp's President & CEO, Todd P. Kelsey, sold 1,000 shares of common stock for $290,000 on June 3, 2026. This transaction occurred as PLXS stock is near its 52-week high, although InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be overvalued. The company recently reported strong fiscal Q2 2026 results, exceeding earnings and revenue expectations, and has received positive analyst ratings from Needham and Stifel, who raised price targets and reiterated Buy ratings.

headline: JPMorgan abandons bearish Tesla stance, skyrocketing price target 227% to $475 (TSLA:NASDAQ)
summary: JPMorgan has significantly changed its outlook on Tesla (TSLA), upgrading its rating from Underweight to Neutral. The firm also dramatically increased its price target by 227.6%, from $145 to $475, indicating a stark shift in its perception of the electric vehicle manufacturer. This move highlights a major re-evaluation of Tesla's prospects by the Wall Street heavyweight.

headline: Barclays (DJP) issues contingent‑coupon notes tied to AMZN/AVGO/NVDA/TSLA basket
summary: Barclays Bank PLC is offering contingent-coupon notes tied to an equally weighted basket of Amazon (AMZN), Broadcom (AVGO), NVIDIA (NVDA), and Tesla (TSLA) stocks. These notes will issue on June 17, 2026, and mature on June 17, 2031, providing monthly contingent coupons of $8.958 per $1,000 note (10.75% p.a.) if the basket value meets or exceeds 80% of its initial value. The notes feature automatic redemption and expose holders to significant principal loss if the basket value falls below a specified buffer at maturity.

headline: Bank of America Just Upgraded UnitedHealth Stock. Here's Why.
summary: Bank of America has upgraded UnitedHealth (UNH) stock to "Buy" and raised its price target to $450, citing strong Q1 results and sustained operational improvement. Analyst Kevin Fischbeck believes UNH's earnings power is materially above guidance, projecting per-share earnings to exceed $26 within two years. The multinational health insurer also offers a compelling 2.35% dividend yield and is expected to see continued positive momentum.

headline: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) Among the Best Low Cost Stocks to Buy Now
summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) is considered one of the best low-cost stocks by hedge funds, with recent bullish ratings from Wall Street analysts like Mizuho Securities and Barclays, who raised price targets to $175 and $182 respectively. Shareholders approved the company's plan to officially move its legal headquarters from New Jersey to Texas, a largely formal move as the physical headquarters has been in Texas since 1989. This relocation aligns Exxon Mobil with other companies moving to Texas, partly due to state laws enhancing legal protections for businesses.

headline: Bernstein Remains a Hold on XPeng, Inc. Class A (9868)
summary: Bernstein analyst Neil Beveridge has maintained a Hold rating on XPeng, Inc. Class A (9868), setting a price target of HK$86.00. This comes as the company reported Q2 revenue of HK$18.27 billion and a GAAP net loss of HK$477.75 million, showing improved financial performance compared to the previous year. The broader analyst consensus for XPeng, Inc. Class A is a Strong Buy with an average price target of HK$91.98.

headline: JPMorgan’s Jamie Dimon to pitch Elon Musk’s SpaceX IPO to uber-rich clients
summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon will lead a nationwide pitch for SpaceX's massive initial public offering to thousands of the bank’s wealthiest clients. This highly unusual move, involving JPMorgan and Bank of America directly approaching private-banking clients, aims to "democratize" the stock market debut of SpaceX, which seeks to raise $75 billion at a $1.75 trillion valuation. The IPO proceeds will fund rocket launches, Starlink expansion, and AI infrastructure, potentially making Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire.

headline: Is Lemonade's AI-Driven Model Finally Delivering on its Promise
summary: Lemonade's AI-driven model is showing significant operational leverage and underwriting improvements, leading to accelerating growth and narrowing losses, with a target for positive adjusted EBITDA by Q4 2026. The company's strategic expansion into autonomous car insurance and diversified products like Pet and European operations are key growth engines, though they face competitive and regulatory hurdles. Despite strong progress, Lemonade remains unprofitable, and its current valuation reflects high expectations for future growth.

headline: Tesla Removes Robotaxi Safety Monitors And Widens Austin Map, But Fleet Shrinks To 20 Cars
summary: Tesla has expanded its driverless Robotaxi service geofence in Austin, Texas, removing safety monitors, but its active fleet has reportedly shrunk to only around 20 vehicles. This contrasts sharply with Waymo's larger fleet in the state. Analysts are divided on Tesla's robotaxi deployment timeline, with some forecasting significant delays due to regulatory hurdles and upcoming software overhauls.

headline: Why Analysts Remain Cautious On Southern Copper (SCCO) Despite A Higher Valuation
summary: Despite Southern Copper Corporation's (SCCO) strategic position in the global EV transition and rising price targets from analysts, many maintain cautious ratings. UBS raised its price target to $145 while keeping a Sell rating, and Scotiabank increased its target to $135 with an Underperform rating. The article suggests that while copper remains crucial for electrification, AI stocks might offer more promising, higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

headline: Keep an eye out: Ford's EV of the future to be tested on Detroit roads
summary: Ford is preparing to test prototypes of a new all-electric midsize pickup truck, designed for affordability and set for a 2027 launch, on Michigan roads. This vehicle is the first from Ford's new Universal Electric Vehicle platform, aimed at offering lower-cost EVs. Concurrently, Ford is addressing F-Series inventory shortages due to a supplier fire and is negotiating aspects of a new USMCA agreement.

headline: Why Lucid Group (LCID) Is Down 8.6% After CEO Shift And New Lawsuits Hit Gravity Shipments
summary: Lucid Group (LCID) experienced an 8.6% stock drop after announcing a CEO transition to Silvio Napoli and facing multiple shareholder class-action lawsuits. These lawsuits allege misleading disclosures regarding supplier quality and delivery issues that impacted Lucid Gravity SUV shipments and financial results. The company's investment narrative now hinges on Napoli's ability to improve operational execution, cost competitiveness, and organizational streamlining amid capital raises and production challenges.

headline: Geode Capital Management LLC Acquires 277,424 Shares of Celsius Holdings Inc. $CELH
summary: Geode Capital Management LLC increased its stake in Celsius Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:CELH) by 8.4% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 277,424 shares and now owning a total of 3,565,409 shares valued at approximately $163.1 million. This increase follows Celsius's strong quarterly earnings, where the company exceeded EPS and revenue estimates, with revenue growing by 137.7% year-over-year. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for CELH with a consensus price target of $64.53, despite some recent price target adjustments.
